ℹ️ Tests with Infrastructure Limitations

The following tests require external infrastructure not available in this environment:

  • example_remote_bteq.py
  • example_remote_tpt.py
  • example_tpt.py
  • example_bteq.py
  • example_s3_to_teradata_transfer.py
  • example_teradata_compute_cluster.py
